claimText: UCLA Academic Senate guidance encourages instructors to clarify and communicate expectations to students and to consider incorporating academic integrity policies into the syllabus.
normalizedValue: Instructors are encouraged to communicate AI expectations and consider syllabus academic integrity policies.

citation.citationTitle: Teaching Guidance for ChatGPT and Related AI Developments
citation.sourceRights: Official source retains original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
